author: SantiMod
content:
In Miami for the #Bitcoin2021 Crypto Weekend? 

Join us at Abracadabra tonight to experience the depths of the Star Atlas metaverse - with live soundscapes by blond_ish and disclosure!

FTX_US-powered tickets are available at miami.abrafest.com. Come say hi!
